name: Opencode-Harness
description: Plugin Multi agente para desenvolvimento com Opencode
author: Alexandre Henrique

scripts.validate: npm run validate:syntax && npm run validate:types && npm test
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/safe-logger.test.ts tests/harness-tools.test.ts tests/harness-db.test.ts tests/harness-advance.test.ts tests/path-boundary.test.ts tests/path-boundary-frontend.test.ts tests/lgpd-sanitizer.test.ts tests/harness-lifecycle.test.ts tests/analysis-tools.test.ts tests/cli-tools.test.ts tests/management-tools.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: node --experimental-strip-types --experimental-test-coverage --test tests/safe-logger.test.ts tests/harness-tools.test.ts tests/harness-db.test.ts tests/harness-advance.test.ts tests/path-boundary.test.ts tests/path-boundary-frontend.test.ts tests/lgpd-sanitizer.test.ts tests/harness-lifecycle.test.ts tests/analysis-tools.test.ts tests/cli-tools.test.ts tests/management-tools.test.ts
scripts.skills:status: echo '=== Setores ===' && ls skills/ && echo '' && echo '=== Por setor ===' && for d in frontend backend design harness geral seguranca pessoal; do count=$(ls skills/$d/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "  skills/$d/: $count skills"; done
